evals.title: 基本動作: 値の差異検出
evals.prompt: Compare reference.csv and test.csv. Keys: id,date,category,item. Data: amount,tax_rate. Ignore: memo.
expectations: 商品D amount: 4200 vs 4200.0 detected (string comparison)

evals.title: 行の欠損・追加
evals.prompt: Compare reference.csv and test.csv. Keys: id,date,category,item. Data: amount,tax_rate. Ignore: memo.
expectations: Row count mismatch reported: reference 10, test 10

evals.title: 重複キー検知
evals.prompt: Compare reference.csv and test.csv. Keys: id,date,category,item. Data: amount,tax_rate. Ignore: memo.
expectations: 2 duplicate keys detected in test file
Duplicate key for id=3 (原料X) reported
Duplicate key for id=7 (商品D) reported

evals.title: 特殊文字 (パイプ・全角スペース・タブ・クォート)
evals.prompt: Compare reference.csv and test.csv. Keys: id,date,category,item. Data: amount,tax_rate. Ignore: memo.
expectations: Pipe character in key does not break comparison
Tab character in key does not break comparison
Double quote in key does not break comparison

evals.title: 完全一致 (行順シャッフル)
evals.prompt: Compare reference.csv and test.csv. Keys: id,date,category,item. Data: amount,tax_rate. Ignore: memo.
expectations: Report states all matched rows are identical

evals.title: 複数テスト対象 (1 ref vs 2 tests)
evals.prompt: Compare reference.csv against test_a.csv and test_b.csv. Keys: id,date,category,item. Data: amount,tax_rate. Ignore: memo.
expectations: Summary table has columns for both test_a and test_b
test_a: 2 rows with diffs, 0 missing, 0 extra
test_b: 2 rows with diffs, 1 missing, 0 extra
Separate detail sections for each test file

evals.title: 実データ (日計表OCRサンプル)
evals.prompt: Compare reference.csv (normal1) and test.csv (many1). Keys: pageNum,category,label. Data: Date,amount,tax_rate. Ignore: checksum.
expectations: Duplicate keys detected in both files
Large number of ref-only and test-only rows (label differences from OCR)
